summoning_descent.name: The Descent
summoning_descent.description: The Iron Cross cell's rite to call the descending god (外神) into Tingen. Each ingredient binds another thread of the gate; the final step demands the marked sacrifice.
steps: Inscribe the consecrated circle in chalk.
Set and light the three candles at its points.
Lay the salt wards and speak the descending name.
Offer the marked sacrifice to open the gate.
